final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: interior-design-render
Asset type: editorial interior photography, lifestyle magazine spread
Primary request: serene Chinese Zen tea room with natural wood tea table, Yixing clay teapot and cups, calligraphy scroll and bonsai as backdrop, bamboo shadows visible through window
Scene/backdrop: traditional Chinese tea room interior, floor-to-ceiling window overlooking bamboo grove, soft daylight filtering through leaves creating dappled shadows
Subject: minimalist tea ceremony setup on solid wood tea table, authentic Yixing purple clay teapot with matching cups, aged calligraphy scroll hanging on wall, carefully pruned bonsai tree on wooden stand
Style/medium: contemporary Chinese interior design photography, soft naturalistic rendering
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, eye-level perspective, balanced symmetry with tea table as central anchor
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light from window, gentle shadows of bamboo leaves dancing on walls, tranquil and contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: warm natural wood tones + deep brown clay + ink black calligraphy + fresh green bamboo + muted cream paper
Materials/textures: smooth polished wood grain, porous unglazed clay teaware, rice paper scroll texture, delicate bonsai foliage, translucent bamboo leaves
Constraints: maintain authentic Chinese tea culture aesthetic, emphasize harmony between interior and nature
Avoid: overly saturated colors, modern plastic materials, cluttered composition, artificial lighting, Western furniture elements
